test.notes: Full `bun run test --run` includes 7 known pre-existing failing suites under db/node_provider_plugins/covalt-n8n-nodes; excluded for milestone signal.

typecheck.notes: Only known pre-existing type errors under db/node_provider_plugins were reported.

blockingIssues.description: plugin_registry accepts non-HookType keys; invalid hook keys can be registered and violate typed hook contract.
plugin_hooks dispatch logging assumes hook_type.value; invalid hook key can raise AttributeError during error handling and break failure isolation.
chat_graph_runner fallback behavior regresses: when no hook candidates exist it falls back to all roots instead of preserving prior chat-start preference.
node_route_index route-id resolution is ambiguous on collisions and may choose unintended node types by lexical ordering.
node-scoped onConnectionValidate filtering checks only context.nodeType, but connection context uses sourceNodeType/targetNodeType, so hooks can be skipped.
registerPlugin is non-atomic; partial node/hook registrations can persist if later entries fail before plugin commit.
canvas.tsx used memo without importing it, causing TS2304 and failing typecheck.
node.tsx passed NodeDefinition | undefined where helper expected NodeDefinition | null, causing TS nullability errors.
properties-panel.tsx passed possibly undefined definition to helper expecting nullable shape, causing TS nullability errors.
Missing runtime entrypoint error path omits RPC method context, violating requirement that all runtime errors include method.
Invalid list_definitions shape error path omits method context, violating requirement that all runtime errors include method.

appliedUpdates.description: Added frontend hook context contract note documenting that connection validation should use sourceNodeType/targetNodeType for node-scoped filtering.
Added an additive `test_frontend_filtered` command to run Vitest while excluding known pre-existing failing suites under db/node_provider_plugins.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require `bunx tsc --noEmit` in verification before handoff for frontend features.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: frontend-core-decoupling introduced TypeScript compile failures that were not caught before handoff; a dedicated follow-up fix feature was required.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Expand hook-related test guidance to require node-scoped coverage for each hook context shape (including sourceNodeType/targetNodeType for connection validation).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: frontend-plugin-registry-and-hooks missed node-scoped onConnectionValidate filtering defect due context-field mismatch.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify baseline validation behavior when mission docs declare known pre-existing failures, including how to report filtered validation evidence without false deviation noise.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Multiple plugin-api feature handoffs reported baseline validation deviations due the same known pre-existing db/node_provider_plugins failures.

rejectedObservations.observation: No backend runtime hook registration path exists outside tests.
rejectedObservations.details: This may reflect milestone scoping (plugin-api foundation before builtin migration) rather than shared-state documentation drift.

rejectedObservations.observation: services.yaml test command should be overwritten to exclude db/node_provider_plugins failures.
rejectedObservations.details: Changing default global validation command is a policy decision; instead of overwriting, an additive filtered command was added and default behavior left unchanged.

rejectedObservations.observation: frontend-worker test-first should be removed for compile-only fixes.
rejectedObservations.details: Potentially useful but policy tradeoff depends on orchestrator preference; recommendation deferred.
